ItacPersonItem.Notes: Born into a Lutheran family in Amsterdam, he later converted to Catholicism, he collaborated with Caspar Van Wittel. See Klaas Van Berkel, `Cornelius Meijer inventor et fecit`, in Merchants and Marvels. Commerce Science and Art in Early Modern Europe, ed. by Pamela smith and Paula Findlen (New York: Routledge, 2001), pp. 277-94.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
